transcript.text:
(The go-to city for her mukbang...) This is Daejeon Terminal Complex
(Daejeon)
(Today, Dajeon again!!) I'm in Daejeon
(Daejeon, city of legendary foods...)
(And another legendary food joins the list...)
(Have you heard, cockle jjamppong!!)
(The reviews are testament to this Daejeon delicacy...)
(Eat cockles...)
(Inhale noodles...)
(Infinitely repeat...)
(Open a branch in Seoul!?) I think they'd do well in Seoul
(Plus, delicious foods on par with cockle jjamppong...)
(Do.. you wanna come to Seoul?) Maybe I'll open the first branch...?
(Greeted by a clear sky)
Hello, guys
Today, I'm in Daejeon

(Daejeon's cockle jjamppong!) Apparently, there's a place famous for cockle jjamppong
So I was invited there
(Curious... Cockle jjamppong) I never tried cockle jjamppong before...
(Already looking forward to it) Will the clams be piled up on spicy noodles?
(Let's go) See you there
(On the 1st floor of this tall building)
('Hyangmi's Jjamppong,' Seo-gu, Daejeon)
Hello!
(Boss appears!) I've been waiting
(I heard good things...!) Cockle jjamppong is really famous
(Selling cockle jjamppong since 2012!) I made it in 2012
(The store was 'Hyangmi-gak') 2 years later, we changed to 'Hyangmi's'
(Now it's 'Hyangmi's Jjamppong!) Because the name 'Hyangmi-gak'
was used by others without permission
(Menu tablet!) We have a lot of dishes
Cockle jjamppong and

I should have black bean noodles! One jjajangmyeon
- Sichuan soup noodles? - Sacheontangmyeon, yes
Can you recommend me one?
(Boss recommends) Would you try a rosé jjamppong?
- Rosé jjamppong? Sounds tasty - Yes
(Favored among women...!) Many female customers like it
Then the rosé jjamppong
And cream shrimp
And Dongpo pork
Try pepper-fried chicken, Yuringi!
Yuringi! I'd like that one too, please
(Order complete) We'll prepare them for you
(Here comes Daejeon delicacies)
(Sacheontangmyeon)
(Cockle jjamppong)
(Beef rosé jjamppong)

(Uni jjajangmyeon)
(Chinese cream shrimp)
(Yuringi)
(Dongpo pork)
(6 dishes in total, all ready to go!)
(Here comes the big one!!) Wow
Here's your order
Looks great!
- Thank you - Here's jjajang, rosé jjamppong
- Cockle jjamppong, sacheontangmyeon - Great
(Half the table is full...) Dongpo pork
This is Yuringi
(One last dish...)
(Everyone's here!) Thank you
(Ta-da) Wow! Looks delicious
This is cockle jjamppong

This is uni jjajangmyeon
Beef rosé jjamppong
Sancheontangmyeon
Yuringi
Dongpo pork and cream shrimp
Cockle jjamppong is the main, I'll try it first
The bowl is full of cockles
(So many big cockles...!) Look at it! They are big cockles! So big!
I'll try the cockle first
Wow!
(Perfect harmony...!) Cockle and jjamppong go really well
There's jjamppong soup inside the cockle
That's so tasty
So crunchy and very chewy
The soup is so good
(Cockle jjampong's deep red soup) See this red? The deep, scarlet red!

(Unbelievable soup!!) Wait, this soup is so real!
Jjamppong soup is very spicy and rich in flavor
Is it the cockles? The taste is so rich!
The soup is to die for
Everyone will like this!
(One bowl is not enough) Should I have just one? It's so good
(LOLOL other dishes are neglected LOL) Noodles are fine too! Put this over here
The soup is fantastic, can I get a refill?
Jjamppong and cockle is a great match
Personal opinion, this is better than mussels and manila clams
So chewy and big
Eating shellfish can be difficult
(Raw cockle jjamppong comes with flesh separated) So for them, raw cockle jjamppong would be nice
(S...Stop...!) I wanna try that too
So good! I should be eating other dishes
(Bring this taste home...) Can one open near my home? Jjamppong is too good

Wow! Thank you
(Jjamppong soup) Just look at this deep color
(Tasty just from the visuals) It just looks appetizing, right?
(Hot and spicy)
Whoa, that's hot!
(Let it cool...) I'm gonna put this here for now
The next dish x4
(Sense have returned) Stop eating!
Dongpo pork!
(So soft and tender...!) Look at how tender it is! So soft
(I'm not angry... Heehee)
This is legit...!
Dongpo pork usually costs 20-30k, or even 50 thousand won
(Only 16k won in 'Hyangmi's Jjamppong') 16 thousand won is so much cheaper
(Loving this good price...) I like this very much
Good

Cream shrimp
Shall we try this?
One with lots of sauce
This is like sticky rice pork! Glutinous rice!
Glutinous rice tempura
(Is it... Correct? Heehee) Is it glutinous rice tempura?
This is fried really well
This might taste great with onions
(Smile just naturally comes...)
This is raw cockle jjamppong
(The actual thing!) Really?
Is it for you, producer?
I envy you...
(Spicy noodles filled with cockle flesh!) This is raw cockle jjamppong
(Producer...? Lol) This looks even better
(Quick recovery) Alright, gimme

(Eat well, producer) Try it, it's so good
Should I try jjajangmyeon now?
(Mouth-watering fantastic visuals...)
The minced meat
It's everywhere in the noodles
For jjajangmyeon, you gotta eat at the restaurant
So great
(Lololololololol)
(She never seems to learn...) No, I had to wear white...
(Uni jjajang CLEARED!)
I'm actually
more drawn to jjajangmyeon than jjamppong
Jjajangmyeon is great
(Cockle jjamppong WINS!) I would definitely just have jjamppong here
Should I try yuringi?
(This much yuringi is only 16K won!) This is a lot! How much is it?

Wow, so many...
Chicken looks really moist
Look how crunchy the batter is
The chicken is so tender
(Crunchy crunch)
Wow, I wanna try raw cockles
(Hand-picking the shells)
What I love about this is,
there are so many dishes
But they all come out just enough
(Various dishes for reasonable prices!) And the price is affordable
You can try so many various dishes, which is great
(Conclusion: Cockle jjamppong is the BEST) But cockle jjamppong is the most amazing
(Sacheontangmyeon) This is... Wow!
(Noodle texture is amazing...!)
(Too white for Sichuan...) But isn't Sichuan soup normally spicy? It doesn't look spicy

Maybe 'Sichuan' stands for 'Sick Juan'
(Pretend you didn't hear that...) What? What? What?
What's all this!!!
(Heehee, I can tease her, lol) Yuringi sauce, I think?
(Heheheheheheh) Don't just film it... Stop!
(To each her own sauce, lol)
Jackpot!
(Oyster-fan is excited, lolol) The oyster...! I really love oysters
(So many oysters..!) Look how many there are! And so big!
And the soup is so rich as well!
It's so deep
Soup is richer than beef bone soup
(Infinite praise) Delicious
So rich and full of flavor
Only a little spicy, for Sichuan
(Spiciness level is not too high!) It is spicy! Only a little!

Wrap oyster with squid
So good
(Inhaling mode ON...)
Dongpo pork
has that oriental flavor
Soy-sauce based
The spices are so rich
It's deep yet it's not too strong
Meat is tender and moist
(Perfect!) It tastes so good with green onion
(Now, beef rosé jjamppong!)
(After finishing Dongpo pork...)
(Dongpo pork CLEARED!)
It's not the rosé taste I know
Rosé taste with fiery scent?
And there are so many noodles

It's quite a lot
It's a bit spicy, kids would love it
Love it
(Empty)
(Beef rosé jjamppong CLEARED!)
(Hand-picking the shells again...)
(Grumble...) I wanted raw cockles...
(Still pissed) Producer had a bowl all to himself...
It's fun to separate the shells, lol
Mine was a bit boring, lol
(That's your excuse? Lmao) You seemed so happy eating it
It's really delicious
Cockles are delicious
I'm gonna be eating them all!
(Endless supplies of cockles...)
('Hyangmi's Jjampong,' to the last drop, CLEARED!)

Did you eat well? Hehe
It's so delicious, sir
- Cockle jjamppong was the best...! - That's good
Could I open the 1st branch in Seoul...? Lol
Producer will open the 2nd branch, lololol
(It's a joke that is not like a joke... Heehee!) Yeah, yeah...
Anyways, I had a great meal once again!
